tasks.subject: [sidebar-tabbed-views] [P3] Update documentation for sidebar tabs and AgentSidebar rename
tasks.description:
Update internal documentation to reflect the `AgentSidebar` rename and new sidebar tabs feature.

## Files to Update

### 1. `contributing/design-system.md`

Add a new section documenting the sidebar tabs pattern. Insert after the existing sidebar section or at the end of the UI patterns section:

```markdown
### Sidebar Tabs

The sidebar uses a custom tab bar (not Radix Tabs) for switching between Sessions, Schedules, and Connections views.

| Element | Specification |
|---|---|
| Tab bar height | Auto (py-1.5) |
| Tab button padding | p-2 |
| Tab icon size | --size-icon-sm |
| Sliding indicator | h-0.5 rounded-full bg-foreground |
| Indicator animation | Spring: stiffness 280, damping 32 |
| Schedules badge | text-[10px] size-4 bg-green-500 |
| Connections dot | size-1.5 rounded-full |
| Status colors | green=ok, amber=partial, red=error |

All three views are mounted simultaneously and use CSS `hidden` toggling to preserve state (scroll position, expanded items) across tab switches. See ADR-0107 for the decision rationale.
```

### 2. `contributing/project-structure.md` (if it exists and mentions SessionSidebar)

Search for `SessionSidebar` and replace with `AgentSidebar`. Also note the new file structure:

```markdown
features/session-list/
├── ui/
│   ├── AgentSidebar.tsx          # Main sidebar component (renamed from SessionSidebar)
│   ├── SidebarTabRow.tsx         # Tab navigation bar
│   ├── SessionsView.tsx          # Session list view
│   ├── SchedulesView.tsx         # Schedule summary view
│   ├── ConnectionsView.tsx       # Adapter/agent summary view
│   ├── SessionItem.tsx           # Individual session row
│   └── SidebarFooterBar.tsx      # Footer with branding and settings
├── model/
│   └── use-connections-status.ts # Derived connection status hook
├── __tests__/
│   ├── AgentSidebar.test.tsx
│   ├── SidebarTabRow.test.tsx
│   ├── SchedulesView.test.tsx
│   ├── ConnectionsView.test.tsx
│   ├── use-connections-status.test.ts
│   ├── SidebarFooterBar.test.tsx
│   └── SessionItem.test.tsx
└── index.ts
```

### 3. Update any references in `contributing/architecture.md` if SessionSidebar is mentioned

Search and replace `SessionSidebar` with `AgentSidebar`.

## Important Notes

- Only update existing documentation files. Do NOT create new markdown files.
- The spec explicitly states "No new external docs needed (internal UI feature)" — only internal contributing docs need updating.
- The spec also states updating 100+ spec/research/doc references to SessionSidebar is deferred to a follow-up pass. Only update the contributing docs that are actively maintained and referenced by developers.

## Acceptance Criteria

- `contributing/design-system.md` has a sidebar tabs section with spacing, icon sizes, badge patterns
- No references to `SessionSidebar` in actively maintained contributing docs (architecture.md, project-structure.md if it exists)
- No new documentation files created
